![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/63fd1b9d789c4b2d5bad5871/971b4f28-0aa7-4dd6-8588-0dc43a33c1c2/Silverman+Home+Banner.png) # change for the better. **Management Advisory & Restructuring Services** [ Learn more ](https://www.silvermanconsulting.net/services) Our mission is to deliver dynamic solutions through agile innovation and operational improvement. Whether our clients are looking for a path to recovery, to improve, to grow, or to exit, we offer guidance through every challenge, and a path forward to a brighter future. * ## Transformation & Restructuring Building a better foundation for tomorrow. [Learn More](https://www.silvermanconsulting.net/transformation-restructuring) * ## Interim Management Seasoned professionals by your side. [Learn More](https://www.silvermanconsulting.net/interim-management) * ## Growth ADVISORY Maximizing value for all stakeholders. [Learn More](https://www.silvermanconsulting.net/growth-advisory) * ## Transaction Advisory Helping maximize opportunity at every turn. [Learn More](https://www.silvermanconsulting.net/transaction-advisory) **Expertise since 1978.** Silverman Consulting is a Chicago-based consulting firm that specializes in management advisory and restructuring services, with a proud history of serving both financially troubled and profitable companies nationwide. Silverman Consulting has helped to engineer the successful turnaround and profit enhancement of more than 700 public and privately held businesses ranging in size from $5 million to over $1.2 billion in annual revenues. Although our clients come from a broad range of industries, each with their own unique story, they are similar in that they all are looking to increase overall profitability and improve their financial operations. Our expertise is in translating managerial and financial disciplines from industry to industry, quickly identifying the reasons a business is underperforming and developing solutions with your management team that will quickly impact your company’s profitability. Silverman Consulting also provides assistance to companies who may not be experiencing financial distress by helping to identify and address areas or situations within your business that are impairing overall corporate profits. ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/63fd1b9d789c4b2d5bad5871/2bc59446-cd31-4e1e-ab76-07e415840b17/Sailing+with+gold+outline+symbol.png) **Latest Insights**
